name: PENGUIN HOTEL 2 -Snake Penguin Ambition-
short_description: Mascot Horror: "Penguin Hotel" Chapter 2 The Snake Penguin is after you. Solve mysteries with a mysterious camera and push forward!
detailed_description:
🐧< add to wish list now~!

Synopsis

Get back your child who was kidnapped by penguins! The Final Penguin has sent his crew of snake penguins to capture you. They won't be easy to catch... Use the special camera to intercept them!

Puzzles

The camera-based puzzles have been powered up!
Use a variety of newly added gimmicks to make your way through the hotel.

What kind of new tricks have been added?
Well, you'll have to check in to find out!

New Penguins

The Snake Penguin isn’t the only one after you.
Many penguins in this hotel have their eyes on you.

Experience a cast of unique penguins and an unpredictable story.

Not a Fan of Horror?

No worries!
The game is designed to be enjoyable even for those who aren’t good with horror.

Series

This game is Penguin Hotel 2, the sequel to Penguin Hotel 1.

We recommend playing Penguin Hotel 1 before jumping into 2.
But even if you've only watched a video or stream, you'll still have fun!

🐧 (Of course, we'd love for you to buy it...)

About Videoing and Distribution

・Please include the title(Subtitle optional) of this game in the title of your video or stream.

・Add the Steam link to the description section of your video or stream.

Other than the above, there are no specific requirements. Please use your best judgment and act responsibly.

We welcome videos and streams to help more people discover this game!
